english: to understand / to comprehend / to retrace (someone's reasoning or steps)
notes: Separable verb (nach- + vollziehen). It implies understanding something by mentally retracing the logic or process behind it, not just knowing a fact.

sentences.german: Ich kann deine Entscheidung gut nachvollziehen.
sentences.english: I can well understand your decision.

sentences.german: Er hat die Argumentation des Lehrers nicht nachvollzogen.
sentences.english: He did not follow/understand the teacher's line of reasoning.

sentences.german: Kannst du nachvollziehen, warum sie so reagiert hat?
sentences.english: Can you understand why she reacted that way?
